chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1073 of 2020 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For hearing of main case 14-12-2023 Mr. Ashfaque Hussain Abro, Assistant Attorney General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Gulshan Ahmed holding brief for Mr. Nisar Ahmed Bhanbhro Advocate for the petitioner seeks disposal of the petition on the ground that the cause of action on which this petition has been filed is no more available due to change in schedule of load-shading. Accordingly in view of above tis petition is disposed of as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
